name: Thoresen Thai Agencies PCL Reg.
summary: Thoresen Thai Agencies PCL is a diversified investment holding company based in Bangkok, Thailand, with interests in shipping, energy, infrastructure, and consumer products. Its business model involves strategic investments across various sectors, managing a portfolio of companies that contribute to its overall revenue and growth. Thoresen Thai aims to create long-term shareholder value through its diverse holdings and active management of its investments.
